title: Urine NMR Metabolomics for Precision Oncology in Colorectal Cancer.
author: Brezmes J Llambrich M Cumeras R Guma J
content: S-EPMC9569997 PMC9569997 Urine NMR Metabolomics for Precision Oncology in Colorectal Cancer. Metabolomics is a fundamental approach to discovering novel biomarkers and their potential use for precision medicine.
